title: dactylorhiza sulphurea
intro: Dactylorhiza sulphurea, also known as the yellow helleborine, is a type of orchid that belongs to the Dactylorhiza genus of terrestrial orchids. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza sulphurea include its ability to alleviate coughs, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, thereby protecting against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tinctures, infusions, or dried extracts, which can be consumed as a natural remedy for respiratory issues and other health concerns.
